com.dlsc.gemsfx.binding.AbstractNestedListBinding

Package
Description
com.dlsc.gemsfx.binding
 

  • Uses of AbstractNestedListBinding in com.dlsc.gemsfx.binding

    Subclasses of AbstractNestedListBinding in com.dlsc.gemsfx.binding
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FlattenedNestedListStreamBinding<T>
    Binds a nested structure of ObservableList<ObservableList<T>> to a flattened Stream<T>.
    class 
    TransformedFlattenedNestedListStreamBinding<T,U>
    Binds a nested structure of ObservableList<ObservableList<T>> to a transformed output U.
    class 
    TransformedNestedListBinding<T,U>
    A concrete implementation of AbstractNestedListBinding that computes its value using a function that directly applies to the source list of lists.
